2604.20261.title: Memory-Augmented LLM-based Multi-Agent System for Automated Feature Generation on Tabular Data
2604.20261.paper_summary: Automated feature generation extracts informative features from raw tabular data without manual intervention and is crucial for accurate, generalizable machine learning. Traditional methods rely on predefined operator libraries and cannot leverage task semantics, limiting their ability to produce diverse, high-value features for complex tasks. Recent Large Language Model (LLM)-based approaches introduce richer semantic signals, but still suffer from a restricted feature space due to fixed generation patterns and from the absence of feedback from the learning objective. To address these challenges, we propose a Memory-Augmented LLM-based Multi-Agent System (\textbf{MALMAS}) for automated feature generation. MALMAS decomposes the generation process into agents with distinct responsibilities, and a Router Agent activates an appropriate subset of agents per iteration, further broadening exploration of the feature space. We further integrate a memory module comprising procedural memory, feedback memory, and conceptual memory, enabling iterative refinement that adaptively guides subsequent feature generation and improves feature quality and diversity. Extensive experiments on multiple public datasets against state-of-the-art baselines demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. The code is available at https://github.com/fxdong24/MALMAS
2604.20261.paper_summary_zh: 自動化特徵生成從原始表格數據中提取信息豐富的特徵，無需人工干預，對於準確且可泛化的機器學習至關重要。傳統方法依賴於預定義的操作符庫，無法利用任務語義，這限制了它們為複雜任務生成多樣化、高價值特徵的能力。最近基於大型語言模型（LLM）的方法引入了更豐富的語義信號，但仍然因固定生成模式而面臨特徵空間受限的問題，並且缺乏來自學習目標的反饋。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了一種基於記憶增強的 LLM 多代理系統（\textbf{MALMAS}）用於自動化特徵生成。MALMAS 將生成過程分解為具有不同責任的代理，而路由代理在每次迭代中激活適當的代理子集，進一步擴大特徵空間的探索。我們還整合了一個記憶模塊，包括程序記憶、反饋記憶和概念記憶，使得迭代精煉能夠自適應地指導後續特徵生成，並提高特徵的質量和多樣性。在多個公共數據集上進行的廣泛實驗，與最先進的基準相比，證明了我們方法的有效性。代碼可在 https://github.com/fxdong24/MALMAS 獲得。
2604.20261.author: Fengxian Dong et.al.
2604.20261.authors: Fengxian Dong, Zhi Zheng, Xiao Han, Wei Chen, Jingqing Ruan, Tong Xu, Yong Chen, Enhong Chen
